titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Walker-Gordon Laboratory Company Records,1920-1971.
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

profiledesc.creation: Finding aid encoded by Evan Fay Earle, September 2007

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

titlepage.titleproper: Guide to the Walker-Gordon Laboratory Company Records,1920-1971.
titlepage.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu
http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

titlepage.date: © 2007 Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Subject files many of Henry W. Jeffers III, vice president of the company.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Subject files concerning fertilizer, milk products, and advertising; financial reports; minutes; alphabetical files, many of Henry W. Jeffers III, vice president of the company, including appointment calendars, cash payments and receipts, payrolls, reports, photographs, and other records.

p.extref: The printed guide is available by clicking here. PDF

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Files pertaining to Henry W. Jeffers II and Henry W. Jeffers III may be used only with permission from them or their heirs.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Walker-Gordon Laboratory Company Records, #3150. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
